ideation: This animation sequence aims to capture the mischievous and slightly unsettling nature of the troll emoji.  The animation will involve both arms, starting with a neutral position and progressing through a series of gestures that suggest slyness and a bit of menace.  The movement will be deliberate but not overly jerky, reflecting the troll's calculated nature. Frame 1 will show both arms at rest. Frame 2 will have the left arm raised, palm open, as if beckoning or gesturing. Frame 3 will show the right arm coming up, palm down, as if pushing or threatening. Frame 4 will have the left arm moving back down, while the right arm remains in its threatening position. Frame 5 will return both arms to a neutral position, but with a slight shift in posture to emphasize the finality of the gesture.

frames.beat: arms hang low, troll waits patiently
left arm beckons, right arm stays hidden
right arm rises, a dismissive push
left arm retreats, right arm holds its ground
both arms return, a sly grin implied
